defs: One who, or that which, carries or conveys; a messenger.
quotes: The air which is but . . . a carrier of the sounds.

defs: One who is employed, or makes it his business, to carry goods for others for hire; a porter; a teamster.
quotes: The roads are crowded with carriers, laden with rich manufactures.

defs: That which drives or carries; as: (a) A piece which communicates to an object in a lathe the motion of the face plate; a lathe dog. (b) A spool holder or bobbin holder in a braiding machine. (c) A movable piece in magazine guns which transfers the cartridge to a position from which it can be thrust into the barrel.
